text.title: pnpm-catalogs Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for pnpm-catalogs as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Adding a new shared dep via `pnpm add react -F web@^19.1.2` without updating the catalog.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Bypasses the catalog and reintroduces drift. Add deps via `pnpm add react -F web` (it picks up the catalog default) or update the catalog first if a new version is needed.

failure-mode.description: Running `pnpm -r test` on every CI run when only one package changed.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Wastes CI minutes and floods the agent's feedback loop with unrelated output. Use `--filter '...[origin/main]'` so the slice is automatic and minimal.
